on_screen_text: Tenants Speak, We Listen (upper-left persistent header text in red)
How are you? Thank you for coming.
So one thing I can tell my landlord
Considers the fact that we are human beings.
the landlords are using undocumented workers
Where do you live? (map activity question)
Place a sticker by your home (map interactive activity text)
I have multiple damp/mold issues on my floor (speech bubble text on map)
discriminate against g[ig] workers, anyone who does
